scenarios.description: default load with empty .env file does not throw and returns Dotenv with only system env entries (branch-true for systemProperties=false, loop-0 entries)
scenarios.precondition: create temporary empty .env file in temp directory; use real DotenvReader and DotenvParser
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Dotenv.entries() equals System.getenv() as an unmodifiable set; returned Dotenv.entries(filter) with non-null filter returns empty set

scenarios.description: load with one valid entry returns DotenvImpl with one file entry and include system env (branch-true, loop-1 entries)
scenarios.precondition: create .env file containing "KEY1=VALUE1" in temp directory; use real parser
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Dotenv.entries() contains System.env and file entry KEY1=VALUE1; returned Dotenv.entries(filter) with non-null returns set containing only DotenvEntry(KEY1,VALUE1)

scenarios.description: load with two valid entries returns DotenvImpl with two file entries and include system env (branch-true, loop-N entries)
scenarios.precondition: create .env file containing "A=1" and "B=2" in temp directory; real parser
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Dotenv.entries() contains file entries A=1,B=2 and system env; entries(filter) returns only two file entries
pseudocode: .env file with A=1 and B=2 in tempDir;

scenarios.description: load with systemProperties enabled sets each variable as System property (branch-false skip-forEach in code, intended branch-true), loop-1 entry
scenarios.precondition: create .env with X=Y; use real parser; call builder.systemProperties()
scenarios.expectedResult: System.getProperty("X") equals "Y"; returned dotenv.get("X") equals System.getenv("X") or "Y" if not present

scenarios.description: load throws DotenvException if .env file missing and throwIfMissing true (default) triggers exception
scenarios.precondition: no .env file in directory; default builder without ignoreIfMissing; real reader
scenarios.expectedResult: throws DotenvException; no system properties set

scenarios.description: load does not throw when .env missing if ignoreIfMissing() is set (branch-true bypass exception)
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Dotenv.entries() equals system env entries; no exception

scenarios.description: load throws DotenvException on malformed line and throwIfMalformed true (default)
scenarios.precondition: .env containing malformed entry "NOEQUALSIGN"; default builder; real parser

scenarios.description: load does not throw on malformed line when ignoreIfMalformed() is set and returns valid entries (branch-true skip exception)
scenarios.precondition: .env contains good=val and BADLINE; builder.ignoreIfMalformed(); real parser
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Dotenv.entries() contains good=val; malformed ignored; no exception

scenarios.description: load with entries(filter) null returns same as entries() (filter-null branch)
scenarios.precondition: .env with KEY=V; default builder; real parser

scenarios.description: load.get(key,default) returns default when key absent (boundary default-value)
scenarios.precondition: .env without MISSING; default builder; real parser
